title: Ibyerekeye pTrack
mission_body: pTrack ifasha abaturage ba Kigali gukurikirana, gutanga raporo, no kugabanya imyanda ya plastike mu turere twabo. Duhuza raporo z'umuryango n'ibihembo by'ugusubiza, tugamije gukora ibyerekeye ibidukikije inshingano ya buri munsi — amanota rimwe rimwe.
capstone_body: pTrack yakozwe nk'umushinga wa capstone wa BSc Software Engineering mu mwaka wa nyuma mu Kigo cy'Ubuyobozi bw'Afrika (ALU). Ugezaho ibyiciro by'igishingiro cy'ikoranabuhanga kugira ngo ishyirwe mu bikorwa impinduka igaragara mu myitwarire y'ugusubiza — ishingira ubushakashatsi ku by'ukuri bwa Segiteri ya Kimironko, Akarere ka Gasabo, Kigali.
pilot_body: pTrack ubu ipiloti hamwe n'abaturage ba Segiteri ya Kimironko, Akarere ka Gasabo. Urubuga rwategetswe gukura mu Kigali yose — no mu Rwanda yose amaherezo — uko gahunda ikura.
